Call ID: EXT-007
Type: external
Date: 2026-05-29
Topic: Quarterly Business Review
Participants: Carlos (account manager); Zara (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Carlos): Hi Zara, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Zara): Let's use today to review how the last quarter went.
AM (Carlos): I've prepared a scorecard of your key metrics and wins.
Customer (Zara): We've had a mixed experience, to be candid.
AM (Carlos): Here's how your outcomes compare to similar teams in your industry.
Customer (Zara): Great session — my team is going to be thrilled with this.
AM (Carlos): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
